mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, password_hash, nickname, role, status, failed_login_count, last_login_at, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM members WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, login_id, password_hash, nickname, role, status, failed_login_count, last_login_at, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM members WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, login_id, password_hash, nickname, role, status, failed_login_count, last_login_at, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM members WHERE nickname = #{nickname} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET nickname = #{nickname}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE members SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, password_changed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE members SET status = 'WITHDRAWN', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE members SET failed_login_count = failed_login_count + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE members SET failed_login_count = 0, last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
